# 自动完成国策（japan_wtt_focus），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。

# 自动完成国策（german_focus），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_ger = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = GER_currency_reforms
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_currency_reforms }
			has_completed_focus = GER_prioritize_economic_growth
			NOT = { has_idea = GER_mefo_bills_ended }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = GER_currency_reforms use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = GER_lower_taxes
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_lower_taxes }
			has_completed_focus = GER_currency_reforms
			NOT = { has_idea = GER_mefo_bills_ended }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = GER_lower_taxes use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls }
			has_completed_focus = GER_lower_taxes
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = GER_abolish_price_controls use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = GER_increased_trade
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_increased_trade }
			has_completed_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = GER_increased_trade use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = GER_housing_developments
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_housing_developments }
			has_completed_focus = GER_currency_reforms
			OR = { 763 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT } 56 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT } }

auto_focus_complete_ger_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_currency_reforms }
			has_completed_focus = GER_prioritize_economic_growth
			NOT = { has_idea = GER_mefo_bills_ended }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_currency_reforms
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_lower_taxes }
			has_completed_focus = GER_currency_reforms
			NOT = { has_idea = GER_mefo_bills_ended }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_lower_taxes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls }
			has_completed_focus = GER_lower_taxes
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_increased_trade }
			has_completed_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_increased_trade
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_housing_developments }
			has_completed_focus = GER_currency_reforms
			OR = { 763 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT } 56 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_housing_developments
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_workers_rights }
			has_completed_focus = GER_housing_developments
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_workers_rights
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_industrial_expansion }
			has_completed_focus = GER_housing_developments
			has_completed_focus = GER_lower_taxes
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_industrial_expansion
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_invest_in_vereinigte_stahlwerke }
			has_completed_focus = GER_industrial_expansion
			has_completed_focus = GER_abolish_price_controls
			42 = { is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT is_demilitarized_zone = no } has_tech = excavation3
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_invest_in_vereinigte_stahlwerke
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_agricultural_reforms }
			has_completed_focus = GER_industrial_expansion
			has_completed_focus = GER_workers_rights
			has_tech = advanced_machine_tools
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_agricultural_reforms
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_urbanization }
			has_completed_focus = GER_agricultural_reforms
			OR = { 59 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT } 978 = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_urbanization
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_wirtschaftswunder }
			has_completed_focus = GER_invest_in_vereinigte_stahlwerke
			has_completed_focus = GER_agricultural_reforms
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_wirtschaftswunder
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_mass_production }
			has_completed_focus = GER_wirtschaftswunder

			NOT = { OR = { NOT = { country_exists = AUS } AUS = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = AUS } OR = { NOT = { country_exists = CZE } CZE = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = HUN } OR = { NOT = { country_exists = HUN } HUN = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = HUN } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_danubian_membership
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_danubian_expansion }
			has_completed_focus = GER_danubian_membership
			is_subject = no is_faction_leader = yes NOT = { has_war_with = YUG } NOT = { has_war_with = ROM }
			NOT = { OR = { NOT = { country_exists = YUG } YUG = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = YUG } OR = { NOT = { country_exists = ROM } ROM = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = ROM } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_danubian_expansion
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_no_balkan_communism }
			has_completed_focus = GER_danubian_expansion
			is_subject = no OR = { any_country = { original_tag = HUN has_government = communism } any_country = { original_tag = ROM has_government = communism } any_country = { original_tag = YUG has_government = communism } any_country = { original_tag = BUL has_government = communism } }

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_low_countries_membership }
			has_completed_focus = GER_central_european_alliance
			is_subject = no is_faction_leader = yes NOT = { has_war_with = HOL } NOT = { has_war_with = BEL } NOT = { has_war_with = LUX }
			NOT = { OR = { NOT = { country_exists = HOL } HOL = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = HOL } OR = { NOT = { country_exists = BEL } BEL = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = BEL } OR = { NOT = { country_exists = LUX } LUX = { is_subject = yes } is_in_faction_with = LUX } }

			NOT = { EST = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_in_faction_with = SOV exists = no has_war_with = SOV is_subject = yes } } LAT = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_in_faction_with = SOV exists = no has_war_with = SOV is_subject = yes } } LIT = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_in_faction_with = SOV exists = no has_war_with = SOV is_subject = yes } } }

	else_if = {

		}

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_finnish_membership }

	else_if = {

			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_strike_at_the_source }

		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_strike_at_the_source
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_reverse_the_brain_drain }
			has_completed_focus = GER_the_monarchy_compromise

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs }

			has_completed_focus = GER_central_european_alliance
			is_subject = no
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_the_mannheim_project }
			has_completed_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs
			has_completed_focus = GER_scandinavian_membership
			is_subject = no is_in_faction_with = NOR
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_the_mannheim_project
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_pool_technical_know_how }
			has_completed_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs
			is_subject = no
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = GER_pool_technical_know_how
	}
}

# 自动完成国策（french_focus），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_fra = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_devalue_the_franc
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_devalue_the_franc }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_devalue_the_franc use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_autoroutes
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_autoroutes }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_devalue_the_franc
			any_owned_state = { is_core_of = ROOT infrastructure < 4 }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_autoroutes use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_invest_in_the_metropole
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_invest_in_the_metropole }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_devalue_the_franc
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_invest_in_the_metropole use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_metropolitan_france
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_metropolitan_france }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_invest_in_the_metropole
			any_owned_state = { is_core_of = ROOT free_building_slots = { building = industrial_complex size > 1 include_locked = yes } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_metropolitan_france use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_industrial_expansion
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_industrial_expansion }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = FRA_metropolitan_france has_completed_focus = FRA_algerie_france }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_industrial_expansion use_side_message = yes }

	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_military_factories
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_military_factories }

		}

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_algerie_france
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_algerie_france }

			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_air_doctrine }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = FRA_fighter_focus has_completed_focus = FRA_bomber_focus }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_air_doctrine use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_heavy_bomber_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_heavy_bomber_focus }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_bomber_focus
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_heavy_bomber_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = FRA_naval_bomber_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_naval_bomber_focus }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_bomber_focus
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = FRA_naval_bomber_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
}

	if = {

			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_devalue_the_franc }

	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_autoroutes }

		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_naval_rearmament
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_colonial_naval_bases }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_naval_rearmament
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_colonial_naval_bases
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_develop_colonial_dockyards }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_colonial_naval_bases
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_develop_colonial_dockyards
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_carrier_planes }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_carrier_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_carrier_planes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_rush_the_richelieus }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_capital_ship_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_rush_the_richelieus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_prioritize_the_joffre }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_carrier_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_prioritize_the_joffre
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_undersea_combat }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_the_young_school
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_undersea_combat
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_surface_combat }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_the_young_school
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_surface_combat
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_improved_screen_ships }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_surface_combat
			has_completed_focus = FRA_undersea_combat
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_improved_screen_ships
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_naval_doctrine }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = FRA_prioritize_the_joffre has_completed_focus = FRA_rush_the_richelieus has_completed_focus = FRA_improved_screen_ships }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_naval_doctrine
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_air_focus }
			NOT = { custom_trigger_tooltip = { tooltip = air_focus_bypass_tt NOT = { any_owned_state = { free_building_slots = { building = air_base size > 1 } } } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_air_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_heavy_fighter_focus }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_fighter_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_heavy_fighter_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_air_doctrine }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = FRA_fighter_focus has_completed_focus = FRA_bomber_focus }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_air_doctrine
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_heavy_bomber_focus }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_bomber_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_heavy_bomber_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = FRA_naval_bomber_focus }
			has_completed_focus = FRA_bomber_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = FRA_naval_bomber_focus
	}
}

# 自动完成国策（italian_focus），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。

auto_focus_complete_ita_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_ethiopian_war_logistics_bba }
			NOT = { OR = { NOT = { has_global_flag = second_italo_ethiopian_war_flag } AND = { 550 = { NOT = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ITA } } 559 = { NOT = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ITA } } 844 = { NOT = { is_owned_and_controlled_by = ITA } } } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_ethiopian_war_logistics_bba
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_italian_highways_bba }
			OR = { controls_state = 2 controls_state = 117 controls_state = 162 controls_state = 158 }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_italian_highways_bba
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa }
			has_completed_focus = ITA_italian_highways_bba
			has_completed_focus = ITA_ethiopian_war_logistics_bba
			NOT = { has_global_flag = second_italo_ethiopian_war_flag } OR = { any_owned_state = { is_on_continent = africa } any_subject_country = { capital_scope = { is_on_continent = africa } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_ethiopia }
			has_completed_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa
			OR = { any_controlled_state = { is_core_of = ETH is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT } any_subject_country = { any_controlled_state = { is_core_of = ETH is_fully_controlled_by = PREV } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_develop_ethiopia
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_libya }
			has_completed_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa
			OR = { any_controlled_state = { is_core_of = LBA is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT } any_subject_country = { any_controlled_state = { is_core_of = LBA is_fully_controlled_by = PREV } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_develop_libya
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_eritrea }
			has_completed_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa
			OR = { 550 = { is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT } any_subject_country = { has_full_control_of_state = 550 } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_develop_eritrea
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_somaliland }
			has_completed_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa
			OR = { 559 = { is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT } any_subject_country = { has_full_control_of_state = 559 } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_develop_somaliland
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_regional_development }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_eritrea has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_libya has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_somaliland has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_ethiopia }

			has_completed_focus = ITA_institute_the_five_year_plan
		}

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_common_ground }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = ITA_the_popular_front has_completed_focus = ITA_italian_socialism }

	}
	else_if = {

			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_army_modernization }

			has_completed_focus = ITA_the_fight_overseas
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_ascari
	}
}

# 自动完成国策（british_focus），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_eng = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = crypto_bomb_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = crypto_bomb_focus }
			has_war_with = GER POL = { NOT = { is_in_faction_with = GER } }
			NOT = { OR = { AND = { has_war_with = GER POL = { is_in_faction_with = GER } } AND = { has_war = yes is_in_faction_with = USA } GER = { exists = no } } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = crypto_bomb_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = tizard_mission_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = tizard_mission_focus }
			has_completed_focus = crypto_bomb_focus
			has_completed_focus = radar_focus
			has_government = democratic any_other_country = { has_war_with = ROOT NOT = { has_government = democratic } num_of_factories > 30 } NOt = { has_war_with = USA } USA = { has_government = ROOT has_war = no NOT = { OR = { has_idea = undisturbed_isolation has_idea = isolation } } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = tizard_mission_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = maud_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = maud_focus }
			has_completed_focus = tizard_mission_focus
			is_in_faction_with = USA
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = maud_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = limited_rearmament_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus }
			NOT = { custom_trigger_tooltip = { tooltip = construction_effort_tt NOT = { any_owned_state = { free_building_slots = { building = industrial_complex size > 1 include_locked = yes } } } } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = limited_rearmament_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = ENG_motorized_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_motorized_focus }
			has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = ENG_motorized_focus use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = ENG_tank_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_tank_focus }
			has_completed_focus = ENG_motorized_focus
		}

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = ENG_expand_the_secret_intelligence_service_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_expand_the_secret_intelligence_service_focus }
			has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus

		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = ENG_expand_the_secret_intelligence_service_focus use_side_message = yes }

	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = air_defense_focus
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = air_defense_focus }
			has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus
			if = { limit = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" } OR = { threat > 0.05 has_war = yes has_idea = ENG_no_further_appeasement_idea NOT = { has_government = democratic } } } if = { limit = { NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" } } OR = { threat > 0.05 has_war = yes NOT = { has_government = democratic } } }
			NOT = { custom_trigger_tooltip = { tooltip = air_defense_focus_bypass_tt NOT = { any_owned_state = { free_building_slots = { building = anti_air_building size > 0 } } } } }
		}

auto_focus_complete_eng_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = crypto_bomb_focus }
			has_war_with = GER POL = { NOT = { is_in_faction_with = GER } }
			NOT = { OR = { AND = { has_war_with = GER POL = { is_in_faction_with = GER } } AND = { has_war = yes is_in_faction_with = USA } GER = { exists = no } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = crypto_bomb_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = tizard_mission_focus }
			has_completed_focus = crypto_bomb_focus
			has_completed_focus = radar_focus
			has_government = democratic any_other_country = { has_war_with = ROOT NOT = { has_government = democratic } num_of_factories > 30 } NOt = { has_war_with = USA } USA = { has_government = ROOT has_war = no NOT = { OR = { has_idea = undisturbed_isolation has_idea = isolation } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = tizard_mission_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = maud_focus }
			has_completed_focus = tizard_mission_focus
			is_in_faction_with = USA
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = maud_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus }
			NOT = { custom_trigger_tooltip = { tooltip = construction_effort_tt NOT = { any_owned_state = { free_building_slots = { building = industrial_complex size > 1 include_locked = yes } } } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = limited_rearmament_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_motorized_focus }
			has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ENG_motorized_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_tank_focus }
			has_completed_focus = ENG_motorized_focus
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ENG_tank_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_expand_the_secret_intelligence_service_focus }
			has_completed_focus = limited_rearmament_focus
			has_dlc = "La Resistance"
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = ENG_expand_the_secret_intelligence_service_focus
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = air_defense_focus }

	}
}

# 自动完成国策（usa_focus），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_usa = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution }
			has_completed_focus = USA_continue_the_new_deal
			has_dlc = "Man the Guns" if = { limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = obsolete_focus_branches_visibility option = HIDE } } NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_reestablish_the_gold_standard } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces }
			has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
			OR = { communism > 0.1 has_country_leader = { ruling_only = yes name = "Harry S. Truman" } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_full_desegregation
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_full_desegregation }
			has_completed_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces
			communism > 0.2
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_full_desegregation use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_democratic_socialism
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_democratic_socialism }
			has_completed_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces
			communism > 0.35
			NOT = { has_government = communism }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_democratic_socialism use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines }
			has_completed_focus = USA_democratic_socialism
			has_completed_focus = USA_full_desegregation
			has_government = communism country_exists = "PHI"
			NOT = { "PHI" = { not = { is_subject_of = ROOT } } }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_pacific_decolonisation
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_pacific_decolonisation }
			has_completed_focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_pacific_decolonisation use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_union_representation_act
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_union_representation_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
			congress_high_support_trigger = yes OR = { has_idea_with_trait = communist_revolutionary has_government = communism } not = { has_completed_focus = USA_limited_intervention } not = { has_completed_focus = USA_neutrality_act }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_union_representation_act use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_old_age_pension_act
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_old_age_pension_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_union_representation_act
			congress_medium_support_trigger = yes
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_old_age_pension_act use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_accumulated_wealth_tax_act
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_accumulated_wealth_tax_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_union_representation_act
			OR = { has_idea_with_trait = communist_revolutionary has_government = communism } congress_high_support_trigger = yes
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_accumulated_wealth_tax_act use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_guarantee_the_american_dream
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_guarantee_the_american_dream }
			has_completed_focus = USA_old_age_pension_act
			has_completed_focus = USA_accumulated_wealth_tax_act
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_guarantee_the_american_dream use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_worker_management_act
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_worker_management_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_guarantee_the_american_dream
			congress_high_support_trigger = yes OR = { has_idea_with_trait = communist_revolutionary has_government = communism }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_worker_management_act use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_militia_organization_act
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_militia_organization_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_guarantee_the_american_dream
			congress_high_support_trigger = yes
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_militia_organization_act use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_communal_property_act
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_communal_property_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_worker_management_act
			has_completed_focus = USA_militia_organization_act
			congress_high_support_trigger = yes
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_communal_property_act use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_reintegration
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_reintegration }
			has_completed_focus = USA_communal_property_act
			OR = { has_war_with = CSA has_global_flag = USA_civil_war_fired }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = USA_reintegration use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = USA_reach_out_to_the_ware_group
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_reach_out_to_the_ware_group }
			has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
			has_completed_focus = USA_agricultural_adjustment_act
			OR = { has_government = democratic has_government = communism }
		}

auto_focus_complete_usa_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution }
			has_completed_focus = USA_continue_the_new_deal
			has_dlc = "Man the Guns" if = { limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = obsolete_focus_branches_visibility option = HIDE } } NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_reestablish_the_gold_standard } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces }
			has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
			OR = { communism > 0.1 has_country_leader = { ruling_only = yes name = "Harry S. Truman" } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_full_desegregation }
			has_completed_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces
			communism > 0.2
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_full_desegregation
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_democratic_socialism }
			has_completed_focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces
			communism > 0.35
			NOT = { has_government = communism }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_democratic_socialism
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines }
			has_completed_focus = USA_democratic_socialism
			has_completed_focus = USA_full_desegregation
			has_government = communism country_exists = "PHI"
			NOT = { "PHI" = { not = { is_subject_of = ROOT } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_pacific_decolonisation }
			has_completed_focus = USA_liberty_for_the_philippines
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_pacific_decolonisation
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_union_representation_act }
			has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution
			congress_high_support_trigger = yes OR = { has_idea_with_trait = communist_revolutionary has_government = communism } not = { has_completed_focus = USA_limited_intervention } not = { has_completed_focus = USA_neutrality_act }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = USA_union_representation_act
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {

# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。

			num_of_factories > 74
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = CHI_expand_national_sun_yat_sen_university use_side_message = yes }
	}

# 自动完成国策（china_communist_focus_sea），每月由 on_monthly 调用，每月完成一个：
# 完成链：完成第一个"带高亮(上月标记)且仍可选"的国策——只认已有高亮，避免同 tick 级联。
# 高亮链：给第一个"当前可选"的国策 activate_shine_on_focus（已亮则幂等），即下月完成的目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_prc_sea = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan }
		}
		complete_national_focus = { focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan use_side_message = yes }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			has_shine_effect_on_focus = PRC_know_the_enemy
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_know_the_enemy }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan
			OR = { 615 = { is_fully_controlled_by = SHX } 1045 = { is_controlled_by = NXM } }
			NOT = { 1045 = { OR = { state_is_fully_controlled_by_ROOT_subject_or_faction_member = yes NOT = { is_controlled_by = NXM } } } 615 = { OR = { state_is_fully_controlled_by_ROOT_subject_or_faction_member = yes NOT = { is_controlled_by = SHX } } } }
		}

	else_if = {

			has_shine_effect_on_focus = PRC_the_westward_expedition

auto_focus_complete_prc_sea_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_know_the_enemy }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_put_an_end_to_the_sufan
			OR = { 615 = { is_fully_controlled_by = SHX } 1045 = { is_controlled_by = NXM } }
			NOT = { 1045 = { OR = { state_is_fully_controlled_by_ROOT_subject_or_faction_member = yes NOT = { is_controlled_by = NXM } } } 615 = { OR = { state_is_fully_controlled_by_ROOT_subject_or_faction_member = yes NOT = { is_controlled_by = SHX } } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_know_the_enemy
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_westward_expedition }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_know_the_enemy
			1045 = { is_controlled_by = NXM }
			NOT = { NOT = { 1045 = { is_controlled_by = NXM } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_the_westward_expedition
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_eastward_expedition }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_know_the_enemy
			615 = { is_controlled_by = SHX }
			NOT = { NOT = { 615 = { is_controlled_by = SHX } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_the_eastward_expedition
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_develop_yanan_soviet }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_westward_expedition has_completed_focus = PRC_the_eastward_expedition }
			622 = { is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT } 1032 = { is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT } has_border_war = no
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_develop_yanan_soviet
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_internal_enemy }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_westward_expedition has_completed_focus = PRC_the_eastward_expedition }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_the_internal_enemy
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_rally_the_peasants }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_burn_the_paper_tigers
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_rally_the_peasants
	}
	else_if = {

			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_rally_the_28_bolsheviks }

	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_guide_central_committee }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_rally_the_peasants has_completed_focus = PRC_rally_the_28_bolsheviks }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_guide_central_committee
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_on_guerilla_warfare }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_leadership_of_mao
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_on_guerilla_warfare
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_secure_the_peoples_support }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_leadership_of_mao
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_secure_the_peoples_support
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_propaganda_efforts }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_on_guerilla_warfare has_completed_focus = PRC_secure_the_peoples_support }
			is_in_faction = yes
			NOT = { is_in_faction = no }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_propaganda_efforts
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_dissent_in_the_united_front }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_secure_the_peoples_support
			is_in_faction = yes
			NOT = { is_in_faction = no }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_dissent_in_the_united_front
	}
	else_if = {

			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_question_the_faction_leadership }

	}
	else_if = {

	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_cruisers }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort has_completed_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school }
			any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT } has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser SOV = { exists = yes is_subject = no has_government = communism }
			NOT = { SOV = { OR = { exists = no is_subject = yes NOT = { has_government = communism } } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_cruisers
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_capital_ships }
			OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort has_completed_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school }
			any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT } has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy SOV = { exists = yes is_subject = no has_government = communism }
			NOT = { SOV = { OR = { exists = no is_subject = yes NOT = { has_government = communism } } } }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_capital_ships
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_carriers }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_capital_ships
			has_completed_focus = PRC_cruisers
			any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT }
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_carriers
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_guns }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_guns
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_ocean_navy }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_reappoint_jinguang_as_admiral
			has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_guns
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_ocean_navy
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_capstone }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_ocean_navy
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_capstone
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_central_military_commision }
			has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_capstone
			has_completed_focus = PRC_air_force_capstone
			has_completed_focus = PRC_a_modern_army
		}
		activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_central_military_commision
	}
}

# ============ 总入口 ============
# auto_focus_shine：只点亮当前可选前沿（开局/换国第一天初始化用），并设当日 flag，
#   防止 on_monthly 恰好同日（开局=1月1日）把刚点亮的前沿在同 tick 完成。
# auto_focus_complete：每月调用，完成上月点亮的前沿，再点亮新前沿；初始化当日跳过完成。
auto_focus_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = japan_wtt_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_jap_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = german_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_ger_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = french_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_fra_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = italian_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_ita_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = british_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_eng_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = usa_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_usa_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = china_nationalist_sea_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_chi_sea_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = china_communist_focus_sea }
		auto_focus_complete_prc_sea_shine = yes
	}
	set_country_flag = { flag = autocore_focus_init_today days = 1 value = 1 }
}

auto_focus_complete = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = autocore_focus_init_today } }
		if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = japan_wtt_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_jap = yes
			auto_focus_complete_jap_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = german_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_ger = yes
			auto_focus_complete_ger_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = french_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_fra = yes
			auto_focus_complete_fra_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = italian_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_ita = yes
			auto_focus_complete_ita_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = british_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_eng = yes
			auto_focus_complete_eng_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = usa_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_usa = yes
			auto_focus_complete_usa_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = china_nationalist_sea_focus }
			auto_focus_complete_chi_sea = yes
			auto_focus_complete_chi_sea_shine = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { has_focus_tree = china_communist_focus_sea }
			auto_focus_complete_prc_sea = yes
			auto_focus_complete_prc_sea_shine = yes
		}
	}
}
